results.title: Free AI Tools: Free browser tools for everyday tasks, no login | Product Hunt
results.content:
Hi Product Hunt! I’m [Your Name], the maker of Free AI Tools. I built this project for people who need to complete a small task quickly without creating another account or installing another app. Free AI Tools brings practical browser utilities into one place, including: • Image resizing, compression, and format conversion • PDF merging, splitting, and page extraction • JSON formatting and developer utilities • Text analysis and word counting • Everyday calculators • Prompt-building tools • Design utilities such as color and SVG tools Many file-based tools process inputs directly in the browser, so users can get a result without sending their source files to a separate service. The project is intentionally simple: open a tool, complete the task, and download or copy the result. I’d love [...] Subscribe
